name: Ethos Technologies Inc.
summary: Ethos Technologies Inc. operates a digital insurance platform that enables consumers to apply for and purchase life insurance and related products. The company works with licensed carriers, independent agents, agencies, and third-party fintech channels to distribute activated policies. Revenue is earned through commissions paid by carriers based on annual premiums. Ethos also offers Wills & Estate Planning products alongside its core insurance offerings.
